package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"testing"

	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
)

var errNegative = errors.New("negative")

func compute(value int) (int, error) {
	if value < 0 {
		return 0, errNegative
	}
	return value + 1, nil
}

func TestCompute(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name    string
		input   int
		want    int
		wantErr error
	}{
		{name: "positive", input: 1, want: 2, wantErr: nil},
		{name: "zero", input: 0, want: 1, wantErr: nil},
		{name: "negative", input: -1, want: 0, wantErr: errNegative},
		{name: "large", input: 1000000, want: 1000001, wantErr: nil},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			got, err := compute(tt.input)
			if tt.wantErr != nil {
				require.ErrorIs(t, err, tt.wantErr)
				return
			}
			require.NoError(t, err)
			require.Equal(t, tt.want, got)
		})
	}
}
